articles.title: U.S. seeks forfeiture of $25 million in crypto tied to romance and investment scams
articles.description: The cases add to more than $800 million that authorities say a dedicated federal scam task force has recovered.

articles.title: Forget Nvidia: The next big AI trade could be crypto and blockchain
articles.description: Franklin Templeton’s Sandy Kaul and Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire argue that as autonomous AI agents start spending money on their own, blockchain networks will power the next big AI trade.

articles.title: The digital euro: Surveillance money, or a better alternative to cash?
articles.description: Proponents of the digital euro say its a better alternative to cash that’s fully backed by the ECB. But critics argue it could provide the EU with too much power over its citizens.

articles.title: Passionfroot raises $15M to expand its B2B creator marketplace to the US
articles.description: Passionfroot, a German startup building a marketplace connecting B2B creators with brands, has raised $15M in a Series A round led by Insight Partners.

articles.title: Bitcoin analysis eyes ‘serious volume’ after Binance sees 9K BTC daily outflow

articles.title: Zilliqa Ledger app vulnerability lets attackers recover signer’s private keys
